# Summary

Describe the feature and the problem it solves.

---

## Related Issue

Closes: #

---

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed?

Explain the context and the problem being solved.

---

## Changes Introduced

- New functionality added
- Configuration or workflow changes
- New files or modules introduced

---

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change (describe below)

If breaking:

Explain impact and migration steps.

---

## Risk Level

Select one:

- [ ] Low – isolated change
- [ ] Medium – affects multiple areas
- [ ] High – core functionality change

---

## Testing / Validation

Describe how the change was validated.

Examples:

- CI workflow passed
- MegaLinter successful
- Manual verification completed

---

## Rollback Plan

Describe how this change can be reverted if necessary.

Example:

- revert PR
- disable workflow
- restore previous configuration

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows repository standards
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits
- [ ] CI workflows pass
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Related issue linked
